page_metadata.biotools__summary: The TraceTrack application serves for automatic batch analysis of Sanger sequencing trace files. It accepts a set of trace files and a reference file, performs alignments of trace sequences to corresponding reference sequences and displays an overview of resulting alignments.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The TraceTrack application serves for automatic batch analysis of Sanger sequencing trace files. It accepts a set of trace files and a reference file, performs alignments of trace sequences to corresponding reference sequences and displays an overview of resulting alignments.
